creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 158325
patch to update SAGA GIS from 2.1.4 to 2.2.0

- update to version 2.2.0
- install icons
- rework files/ with 'make makepatch'
- change from ${CHMOD} in Makefile to @mode in pkg-plist

A detailed Changelog you will find at [1]


portlint -AC does not complain.

Poudriere builds fine with HEAD, 10.1 and 9.3, all amd64 and with default options. On HEAD, also tested with all options disabled. Logs are attached.




[1] http://sourceforge.net/p/saga-gis/wiki/Changelog%202.2.0/attachment/changelog_saga_2.2.0.txt
